Private Label Clothing Manufacturing for Your Brand

Updated: July 1, 2026 | By FABRIOZA

Building a clothing brand without manufacturing yourself? FABRIOZA is your private label clothing manufacturer — we produce garments under your brand name, with your labels, your packaging, and your specifications. Starting at just 50 pieces per style, we make private label accessible to startups and established brands alike.

What is Private Label Clothing Manufacturing?

Private label manufacturing means we produce clothing that carries YOUR brand name, not ours. You provide the designs (or choose from our templates), and we handle everything from fabric sourcing to finished, branded garments ready for your customers. It's the same model used by most major fashion brands — they design, we manufacture.

50
Pieces MOQ
24h
Quote Time
500+
Happy Clients
30+
Countries

Our Private Label Services

Custom Woven Labels

Your brand name, woven directly into the garment. We produce damask woven labels, satin labels, and printed fabric labels in any size, fold style, and color combination. Minimum 500 labels per design.

Hang Tags & Swing Tags

Custom-designed hang tags with your logo, brand story, care instructions, and barcode. Printed on premium cardstock with options for foil stamping, embossing, and spot UV.

Branded Packaging

Custom poly bags with your logo, tissue paper with brand printing, cardboard inserts, and mailer bags. Every touchpoint reinforces your brand identity.

Care Labels & Size Tags

Legally compliant care instruction labels in any language. Satin-printed size tags (XS-5XL or custom sizing). RF wash care symbols per international standards.

OEM vs ODM — Which is Right for You?

FeatureOEM (Original Equipment Manufacturing)ODM (Original Design Manufacturing)
Design SourceYou provide complete designs/tech packsWe provide design templates you customize
MOQ50 pieces per style50 pieces per style
Best ForBrands with unique designsStartups testing the market
CostSlightly higher (custom development)Lower (existing templates)
Exclusivity100% exclusive to your brandMay be adapted for other clients

Industries We Serve

  • Fashion Startups: Launch your first collection with low risk
  • Gym & Fitness Brands: Branded activewear and gym apparel
  • Corporate Uniforms: Branded workwear for teams and companies
  • Sports Teams: Private label team kits and fan merchandise
  • E-commerce Sellers: Shopify/Amazon brands needing reliable supply
  • Streetwear Labels: Premium heavyweight blanks with custom finishing

Our Private Label Process

  1. Consultation: Discuss your brand vision, target market, and product needs
  2. Design Development: Create or adapt designs with our team
  3. Sample Production: Physical sample with your labels for approval
  4. Label & Packaging Setup: We produce all branded materials
  5. Bulk Production: Full manufacturing with quality checkpoints
  6. Delivery: Garments arrive ready to sell under your brand

Ready to launch your private label clothing line? Get a free quote from FABRIOZA in 24 hours — no commitment required.

Join 500+ brands. Free mockup. Free sample. Quote in 24 hours. Your design is 100% confidential.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the minimum order for private label?

Our private label MOQ is 50 pieces per style. Label minimums are 500 pieces per label design.

Can I use my own designs?

Yes, OEM manufacturing accepts your complete tech packs and designs. We also offer ODM templates if you need design support.

What labeling options are included?

Woven labels, printed size tags, care labels, hang tags, poly bags, tissue paper, and mailer bags — all customizable with your branding.

How long does private label production take?

First sample: 5-7 days. Label production: 7-10 days. Bulk production: 2-4 weeks after approval.

Is my design protected?

Absolutely. We sign NDAs on request and never share your designs with other clients. Your intellectual property is 100% protected.
